name: @tnnevol/halo-cli
description: CLI tool to manage blog posts in Halo CMS

scripts.preversion: echo 'version will be read from package.json by Go binary'
scripts.check-version: echo "Go binary version: $(./bin/halo-linux version)" && echo "package.json version: $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"

author: tnnevol
